Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Amber confronts Shavon; Will wants to be with his cousin Tereca.
Video.title: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Image.alt: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Video.summary: Kejana’s aunt Rose moved in with her and her man Dicoy. Dicoy ended up cheating with Rose! Can Ruben get Selena to leave his best friend Scott? Eddie had a fling with transsexual Chloe, but then his girlfriend’s father found out!
Video.title: Down and Dirty Affairs

Video.summary: Zack and Cheyenne have differing hopes for their future; Nee Nee confronts the friend she thinks is trying to sabotage her relationship with her boyfriend; Stormi confesses to sleeping with her friend's man.
Video.title: Driven to Cheat

Video.summary: Geeky Ben finally got with his dream girl and now wants to leave his girlfriend Brittany. Katie ended up sleeping with best friend Julie’s man on a camping trip, but he’s got his own secret. Tina took over her friend Leanne’s house and husband!
Video.title: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Image.alt: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Video.summary: Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces!
Video.title: Dear Santa…

Video.summary: Brooklyn sheds light on why a married woman contracted an STD; Brittany's husband is not the only one she should distrust; Brianna's boyfriend and his accomplice have been using her.
Video.title: Horrible Husbands

Video.summary: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.
Video.title: Stay Out of My Threesome!

Video.summary: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.
Video.title: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Image.alt: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Video.summary: A 17-year-old and her mother are prostitutes.
Video.title: Steve Confronts a 17-Year-Old Prostitute

Video.summary: Stripper Brittany confronts a co-worker who hooked up with one of Brittany's clients; Bebo's baby-mama confesses to sleeping with his best friend; three guests provide a surprise.
Video.title: Battle Royale With Cheese

Video.summary: Bailey says she's proud that she's a prostitute but her boyfriend isn’t. Next Tina learns how her man, Lewis, is earning his income. Then..."Blimp the Pimp" is here today to tell his girlfriend that he wants her to go to work for him.
Video.title: Baby, I'm A Hooker

Video.summary: Derrick reveals a secret he has been keeping from the woman he has been seeing; lesbian stripper Diana is on a mission to break up one relationship and start a new one; Summer is a lesbian who cannot stop having sex with men.
Video.title: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Image.alt: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold

Video.summary: A woman finds romance with her fiancee's twin sister; a man turns to another woman for attention; a man tells the mother of his child that he wants to be with someone else.
Video.title: Lesbian Twin Love Triangle

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.
Video.title: Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Video.summary: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heathers boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa’s life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?
Video.title: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Image.alt: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Video.summary: Can Sally help these couples salvage their families? She calls in the experts to find out.
Video.title: Couples On The Verge of Divorce

Image.alt: Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce

Video.summary: These parents do not see eye to eye when it comes to their cross-dressing children.
Video.title: I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Image.alt: I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Video.summary: Dysfunctional families confront the root of the problem with Sally’s help on today’s heavily dramatic episode.
Video.title: Psycho Mother-in-law

Video.summary: Actresses and Models appear on the show to express how the paparazzi and tabloids interfered with lies that affected their professional caress and personal lives.
Video.title: Tabloid Lies

Video.summary: Families confront their out of control stepchildren about issues that are tearing the family apart.
Video.title: Troubling Behavior

Video.summary: These guests live their lives as the opposite sex. Today they stand up for themselves against friends and family who do not accept who they are.
Video.title: You Don't Really Know Who I Am

Image.alt: You Don't Really Know Who I Am
You Don't Really Know Who I Am
You Don't Really Know Who I Am

Video.summary: Sons and daughters feel that their mothers dress and act too sexy and they want them to change.
Video.title: Mom, Stop Embarrassing Me!

Video.summary: Do you know what its like to go to the Boy Scouts and have them ask you where your father is?
Video.title: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Image.alt: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Video.summary: Parents are fed up with their monster children and now they're demanding changes.
Video.title: I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!

Image.alt: I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!
I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!
I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!

Video.summary: These men think they are gifts from God. They are about to be humbled.
Video.title: Stud or Dud?

Video.summary: These couples may have survived the honeymoon phase, but do they have what it takes to last?
Video.title: We're Still Newlyweds…Is It Over?

Video.summary: Mother stands up to her daughter in an attempt to protect her grand children.
Video.title: My Daughter is Unfit to Parent

Image.alt: My Daughter is Unfit to Parent
My Daughter is Unfit to Parent
My Daughter is Unfit to Parent

Video.summary: Children appear on today’s show to express the pain their Mother put them through which destroyed the family.
Video.title: Angry with Mom
